acts.name: Assembly
beats: Character introductions — who are you, why are you here?
The expedition roster — Starkweather's pitch, Moore's caveats
Player archetypes chosen, backstories established

acts.name: The Briefing
beats: The curated dossier — Dyer's published account, Lake's camp disaster
Starkweather's additions vs. Moore's annotations
Equipment review — Pabodie's drill, radios, dog teams, planes
Questions the briefing doesn't answer

acts.name: Departure
beats: Final preparations at Arkham wharf
Boarding the vessel — last contact with civilization
The expedition sails south

acts.name: The Voyage
beats: Shipboard dynamics — patron tensions, crew relationships form
Crossing the Drake Passage — the world behind shrinks
First sight of the ice barrier — two hundred feet of vertical white

acts.name: Base Camp
beats: McMurdo Sound — establishing operations
Historic huts — layers of previous expeditions
Supply caches, radio checks, reconnaissance flights
Dogs settle in — McReady's early warning system

acts.name: Lake's Camp
beats: Push inland — following Dyer's route
Discovery of the first camp — anomalies begin
Star-shaped graves. Equipment that shouldn't be damaged the way it is.
Radio contact becomes intermittent

acts.name: The Ascent
beats: Approaching the mountain range — peaks exceeding 35,000 feet
Caves with regular openings — formations like cubes on peaks
Dyer's private journal page found
Equipment malfunctions near certain geological formations

acts.name: The City
beats: First glimpse of cyclopean ruins beyond the mountains
Entering the city — architecture that predates all human civilization
The scale becomes apparent — this was built by something not human

acts.name: The Murals
beats: Wall carvings depicting Earth's true history
Elder Things — the original builders, a billion years ago
The Shoggoths — created as servants, rebelled
Understanding dawns — Dyer was right about everything

name: The Descent
subtitle: Into the tunnels, confrontation, flight begins

acts.name: Into the Tunnels
beats: Fifteen-foot carved passages descending into warmth
Crude carvings overlay the originals — something else has been here
Giant blind albino penguins — an underground ecosystem
The temperature is wrong. The nameless scent grows stronger.

acts.name: The Encounter
beats: Confrontation — not combat, but witness
Something that breaks their model of reality
Tekeli-li — the sound that Poe recorded, that Dyer heard
The Shoggoth — or what the Shoggoths became

acts.name: Flight
beats: The escape begins — back through the tunnels
Radio silence — total blackout, alone
The dogs refuse to go back. They understand.
Running across the ice, leaving the city behind

name: The Return
subtitle: Flight, the vision, the moral choice

acts.name: The Ice
beats: Fleeing across the plateau — the cold is actively hostile
Equipment failing, fuel critical
Who made it out? Who didn't?
The expedition vessel — if it's still there

acts.name: The Vision
beats: The Violet Mountains — a dim elfin line on the western horizon
What the Elder Things feared. Cities built there crumbled.
The final revelation — something worse than what they've already seen
Danforth looked. Danforth screamed.

acts.name: The Choice
beats: What do you do with what you know?
Tell the world — and not be believed, like Dyer?
Destroy the evidence — and let the next expedition walk in blind?
The ceremony — carrying knowledge that changes you permanently
